name: ahadul-theme
description: Blank WordPress theme with TailwindCSS and SCSS

scripts.build: npm run build:scss && npm run build:tailwind && npm run build:js
scripts.watch: concurrently "sass --watch src/scss/main.scss src/scss/main.css" "tailwindcss -i src/scss/main.css -o dist/css/main.css --watch" "npm run build:js"
